hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py) if ! out=$(python tools/check_invariants.py 2>&1); then jq -n --arg r "$out" '{decision:"block",reason:("architecture invariant violation detected by tools/check_invariants.py:\n"+$r)}'; fi;; esac
